name: Lovely Us
overview: A coming-of-age story of a group of youths who grew up together.  The story takes place in 2007; four children from Shu De Faculty and Staff Family Hospital entered high school together, welcoming their sixteenth year of life. They form their own clique named "No. 1992", and embark on a journey filled with dreams, growth and warmth.

trailers.title: Trailer：Embark on a journey filled with dreams, Growth and Warmth | Lovely Us 如此可爱的我们|iQIYI
